items.title: Vector Policy Optimization: Training for Diversity Improves Test-Time Search
items.title_cn: 向量策略优化：多样性培训改善了测试时间搜索
items.summary: Language models must now generalize out of the box to novel environments and work inside inference-scaling search procedures, such as AlphaEvolve, that select rollouts with a variety of task-specific reward functions. Unfortunately, the standard paradigm of LLM post-training optimizes a pre-specifie...
items.summary_cn: 语言模型现在必须开箱即用地推广到新颖的环境中，并在推理缩放搜索过程中工作，例如AlphaEvolve ，它选择具有各种特定任务奖励函数的部署。不幸的是， LLM培训后的标准范式优化了...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: The Matching Principle: A Geometric Theory of Loss Functions for Nuisance-Robust Representation Learning
items.title_cn: 匹配原理：滋扰-鲁棒表示学习的损失函数几何理论
items.summary: Robustness, domain adaptation, photometric and occlusion invariance, compositional generalisation, temporal robustness, alignment safety, and classical anisotropic regularisation are usually treated as separate problems with separate method families. This paper argues that much of their shared struc...
items.summary_cn: 稳健性、域自适应、测光和遮挡不变性、组合泛化、时间稳健性、对齐安全和经典各向异性正则化通常被视为具有单独方法族的单独问题。这篇论文认为，他们的大部分共同结构...
items.comment: 学术界的新尝试，能否转化为实用产品？时间会给出答案。

items.title: Finite-Particle Convergence Rates for Conservative and Non-Conservative Drifting Models
items.title_cn: 保守和非保守漂移模型的有限粒子收敛速率
items.summary: We propose and analyze a conservative drifting method for one-step generative modeling. The method replaces the original displacement-based drifting velocity by a kernel density estimator (KDE)-gradient velocity, namely the difference of the kernel-smoothed data score and the kernel-smoothed model s...
items.summary_cn: 我们提出并分析了一种用于一步生成建模的保守漂移方法。该方法用核密度估计器（ KDE ）梯度速度代替原始的基于位移的漂移速度，即核平滑数据分数与核平滑模型分数的差异...
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。
